title: RapidMeta | Bimekizumab in plaque psoriasis (audit-first, full-functionality)

pico.pop: Adults randomised in trials registered on ClinicalTrials.gov for Psoriasis

pico.subgroup: Subgroup analyses per parent trial protocol
